# SparkleReleaseKit

SparkleReleaseKit adds a safe, reproducible Sparkle 2 update workflow to an existing macOS Xcode app.

Primary documentation:
- README: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/README.md
- AI integration: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/AI/AI_INTEGRATION.md
- Security model: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/docs/SECURITY_MODEL.md
- CLI reference: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/docs/CLI_REFERENCE.md
- Free distribution: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/docs/FREE_DISTRIBUTION.md
- Developer ID distribution: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/docs/DEVELOPER_ID_DISTRIBUTION.md
- Update signing: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/docs/UPDATE_SIGNING.md
- Configuration schema: https://github.com/LeonTOfficial/SparkleReleaseKit/blob/main/schemas/sparklekit.schema.json
- Official Sparkle documentation: https://sparkle-project.org/documentation/

Agent workflow:
1. Inspect the target macOS project.
2. Select `free`, `developer-id`, or `auto`; default to free when no paid Apple membership exists.
3. Run `sparklekit setup <project-path> --release-mode <mode>`.
4. Add only the public EdDSA key to sparklekit.json.
5. Preview with `sparklekit integrate <project-path>`.
6. Apply with `sparklekit integrate <project-path> --apply`.
7. Follow the generated SparkleReleaseKit/INTEGRATION.md.
8. Run `sparklekit doctor`, build in Release, and verify a real archive using the selected mode.
9. Use `sparklekit test --json`, `sparklekit validate-feed --json`, and `sparklekit verify-update` for deterministic completion evidence.
10. Prepare release staging with `sparklekit prepare-release`; private signing keys remain in Keychain or protected CI secrets.

Never expose or commit private update-signing keys, Apple certificates, App Store Connect keys, passwords, or tokens.
Never equate Developer ID or notarization with Sparkle EdDSA update signing. A paid Apple membership is optional; Sparkle EdDSA is not.
